# Shiny for Python

> Shiny for Python is a framework for building reactive web applications and dashboards in pure Python. It features a reactive execution engine, built-in UI components, and support for generative AI integration.


## Components

- [Shiny Components](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/)

### Inputs

- [Action Button](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/action-button/)
- [Action Link](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/action-link/)
- [Checkbox](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/checkbox/)
- [Checkbox Group](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/checkbox-group/)
- [Dark Mode Switch](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/dark-mode/)
- [Date Range Selector](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/date-range-selector/)
- [Date Selector](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/date-selector/)
- [File Input](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/file/)
- [Numeric Input](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/numeric-input/)
- [Password Field](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/password-field/)
- [Radio Buttons](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/radio-buttons/)
- [Select (Single)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/select-single/)
- [Select (Multiple)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/select-multiple/)
- [Selectize (Single)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/selectize-single/)
- [Selectize (Multiple)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/selectize-multiple/)
- [Slider](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/slider/)
- [Slider Range](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/slider-range/)
- [Switch](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/switch/)
- [Text Area](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/text-area/)
- [Text Box](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/text-box/)
- [Toolbar Button](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/toolbar-button/)
- [Toolbar Select](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/inputs/toolbar-select/)

### Outputs

- [Data Grid](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/data-grid/)
- [Data Table](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/data-table/)
- [Image](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/image/)
- [Map (ipyleaflet)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/map-ipyleaflet/)
- [Plot (Matplotlib)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/plot-matplotlib/)
- [Plot (Plotly)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/plot-plotly/)
- [Plot (Seaborn)](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/plot-seaborn/)
- [Text](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/text/)
- [UI](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/ui/)
- [Value Box](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/value-box/)
- [Verbatim Text](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/outputs/verbatim-text/)

- [Chat](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/chat/)
- [Modal](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/modal/)
- [Notifications](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/notifications/)
- [Progress Bar](https://shiny.posit.co/py/components/display-messages/progress-bar/)

- [Installation](https://shiny.posit.co/py/get-started/install.html)

- [Debug, troubleshoot, & help](https://shiny.posit.co/py/get-started/debug.html)

- [Hosting and deployment](https://shiny.posit.co/py/get-started/deploy.html)
- [Cloud hosting](https://shiny.posit.co/py/get-started/deploy-cloud.html)
- [Self-hosted deployments](https://shiny.posit.co/py/get-started/deploy-on-prem.html)

## Concepts


### Essentials

- [Overview](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/overview.html)
- [User interfaces](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/user-interfaces.html)

### Generative AI

- [Get inspired](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-inspiration.html)
- [Chatbots](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-chatbots.html)
- [Streaming](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-stream.html)
- [Tool calling](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-tools.html)
- [Structured data](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-structured-data.html)
- [Genai Rag](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/genai-rag.html)

### User interfaces

- [Overview](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/ui-overview.html)
- [Jupyter Widgets](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/jupyter-widgets.html)
- [Dynamic UI](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/ui-dynamic.html)
- [UI as HTML](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/ui-html.html)
- [Customizing UI](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/ui-customize.html)

### Reactivity

- [Foundations](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/reactive-foundations.html)
- [Patterns](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/reactive-patterns.html)
- [Mutable objects](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/reactive-mutable.html)

### Data

- [Reading data](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/reading-data.html)
- [Persistent data](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/persistent-storage.html)

### Syntax modes

- [Express vs. Core](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/express-vs-core.html)
- [Choosing a syntax](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/express-or-core.html)
- [Express in depth](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/express-in-depth.html)
- [Transition to Core](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/express-to-core.html)

### Modules

- [Shiny Modules](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/modules.html)
- [Module Communication](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/module-communication.html)

### Bookmarking

- [Bookmarking State](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/bookmarking.html)
- [Advanced Bookmarking](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/bookmarking-advanced.html)
- [Bookmarking with Modules](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/bookmarking-modules.html)

### Testing

- [Unit testing](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/unit-testing.html)
- [End-to-End Testing Your App](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/end-to-end-testing.html)

### Extending

- [Custom JavaScript component](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/custom-component-one-off.html)
- [Custom components package](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/custom-components-pkg.html)

### Comparisons

- [Streamlit](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/comp-streamlit.html)
- [Shiny for R](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/comp-r-shiny.html)

### Miscellaneous

- [Non-blocking operations](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/nonblocking.html)
- [Routing](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/routing.html)
- [OpenTelemetry](https://shiny.posit.co/py/docs/opentelemetry.html)

- [Reactive plot with a sidebar](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/basic-sidebar/)
- [Basic dashboard](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/dashboard/)
- [Restaurant tips dashboard](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/dashboard-tips/)
- [Data Science Adventure](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/data-sci-adventure/)
- [SQL database explorer](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/database-explorer/)
- [What's for dinner?](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/dinner-recipe/)
- [Location distance calculator](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/map-distance/)
- [Model scoring](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/model-scoring/)
- [Streaming database updates](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/monitor-database/)
- [Streaming file updates](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/monitor-file/)
- [Streaming folder updates](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/monitor-folder/)
- [NBA player career comparisons](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/nba-dashboard/)
- [Query Chat](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/querychat/)
- [Article on regularization in ML](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/regularization/)
- [Side bot](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/sidebot/)
- [Stock price tracker](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/stock-app/)
- [Survey form](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/survey/)
- [Survey wizard form](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/survey-wizard/)
- [Workout Plan Generator](https://shiny.posit.co/py/templates/workout-plan/)
